heading: Omitted
label: 32 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , required Indian agents to account for funds received and to be responsible for such funds under their official bonds. The services of Indian agents have been dispensed with since 1908. See and note set out thereunder.act July 1, 1898, ch. 545, § 130 Stat. 595section 64 of this title
